## Checklist

- [ ] I read **[demo/DEVELOPER.md](demo/DEVELOPER.md)** and **[CONFIG.md](CONFIG.md)** where relevant.
- [ ] I ran **`npm run validate:catalog`** and **`npm run compile:layouts`** when **`config.json`** or compiled layouts changed.
- [ ] I ran **`npm run verify:core`** (or equivalent) when **`packages/core`** changed.
- [ ] I updated docs or comments when behavior or public APIs changed.
